hypothesis: We believe that Brazilian freelancers earning 30k-100k BRL/year will pay for an expense tracking app because manual categorization in spreadsheets takes more than 15 minutes per week and causes stress at tax season
target_audience: Brazilian freelancers (designers, developers, consultants) aged 25-40, earning 30k-100k BRL/year, currently using spreadsheets or no tool for financial tracking, with MEI or ME legal status

constraints.resources: 1 PM, 1 designer (part-time, 5h available), access to a community of 200 freelancers on Slack
